fields.description: Leading the migration of legacy monoliths to microservices. Optimized CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 60%. Architecting scalable backend systems serving 100K+ daily requests.
fields.technologies: Django, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, PostgreSQL, Redis

fields.description: Designed hybrid-cloud security frameworks for public sector clients. Orchestrated container workloads across multiple regions. Implemented infrastructure as code practices.
Managing large-scale on-prem server farms. Specialized in high-availability configuration for critical database systems. Automated deployment processes.
